scripts.test: node --test test/adminRoleContract.test.js test/paymentAuthGuards.test.js test/paymentEndpointAuthMatrix.test.js test/storageRulesContentType.test.js test/dataRequestSla.test.js
scripts.test:rules: npm run test:rules:setup && firebase emulators:exec --project wordnerd-artbeat --only firestore "NODE_PATH=./test/rules/node_modules node --test test/firestore.rules.test.js"
scripts.test:storage-rules: npm run test:rules:setup && firebase emulators:exec --project wordnerd-artbeat --only storage,firestore "NODE_PATH=./test/rules/node_modules node --test test/storageMimeMatrix.rules.test.js"
scripts.serve: npm run build && firebase emulators:start --only functions
